name: ranger-camp
summary: A discreet woodland camp — tidy, low-trace, deliberately sited. Small fire in a ring of stones, single bedroll, gear stowed off the ground, sightlines chosen.

primary_palette.note: small stone-ringed fire, bedroll on one side, log-seat opposite
cooking camp — pot on tripod, fire managed, kit organized
lean-to shelter of branches and oilcloth, fire in front
log-as-bench by the fire — gear stacked behind

story_prompts: occupied, ranger present — wary but not hostile, watching before speaking
ranger out scouting — fire banked to coals, gear hidden, returns at dusk
the ranger is wounded and needs help — bloody bandages by the fire
two rangers — one dead, one missing, signs of a fight with something big
it looks like a ranger camp, but too clean — this is a trap baited for travelers

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: outdoor forest — dappled daylight, or dark woods with firelight

anti_patterns: do not use built walls — trees and terrain define the edge
keep prop count low — a ranger leaves little trace on purpose
fire is never pushed against flammable brush — it sits in a clear stone ring
no tents, no wagons, no stacked supplies — this is a travelling camp, not a homestead
